Let's compute sentiment: Data shows Bitcoin reaching $70k in July only 14% yes (low confidence), Bitcoin reaching $67.5k in July 41% yes (moderate), Ethereum dip to $1500 by Dec 31 2026 Yes 41% (moderate). Together, the data reflect divided sentiment."
